title: re-add go.work.sum to git once renovate can update it correctly
body:
revert https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/362/commits/0ed1f193868194300c4065c7f37212748ddf76b6 once renovate can handle updates to it correctly so we don't always have a local diff when running go commands

see https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/362#issuecomment-3361968669

comments.body: I think the two are sort of alternative ways to achieve ~the same thing: we’d like to notice if a dependency’s tag changes. We can achieve that _either_ by committing `vendor` or by committing `*.sum`. (In addition, committing `vendor`, sort of, protects us in case the dependency went away completely.)
